---
title: "Welcome"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: assets/headshot.png
  links:
    - icon: LinkedIn
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com
      target: _blank # opens link in a new browser tab
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
      target: _blank # opens link in a new browser tab
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
      target: _blank # opens link in a new browser tab
---


Hi there! I'm Erin Yang, and I'm an undergraduate studying environmental science and data science at UC Berkeley. I love frogs and newts and I have a cat named Athena!
